summary: Internal FAIR signals are local release-readiness indicators. External OOPS! and FOOPS! results are reported separately so service outages do not masquerade as ontology quality.

fair_signals.label: F / Findable
fair_signals.detail: Internal score for identifiers, versioning, citation, namespace, and findable publication metadata.

fair_signals.label: A / Accessible
fair_signals.detail: Internal score for machine-readable outputs, docs presence, resolver artifacts, and public access hooks.

fair_signals.label: I / Interoperable
fair_signals.detail: Internal score for reuse of imports, mappings, namespace hygiene, and standards-based serializations.

fair_signals.label: R / Reusable
fair_signals.detail: Internal score for license, provenance, versioning, definitions, examples, and release packaging.

transparency_hooks.label: OOPS! ontology pitfall scan
transparency_hooks.detail: OOPS! something went wrong. There was an unexpected error.

transparency_hooks.label: FOOPS! FAIR assessment
transparency_hooks.detail: External FAIR-oriented ontology assessment against the release candidate. File mode does not assess accessibility.

validation_signals.label: Overall validation status
validation_signals.detail: Combined metadata, namespace, mapping, and SHACL validation checks.

validation_signals.label: SHACL conforms
validation_signals.detail: Local SHACL shape execution when pyshacl is available.

validation_signals.label: Missing labels
validation_signals.detail: Release-time missing labels on local schema terms.

validation_signals.label: Missing definitions
validation_signals.detail: Release-time missing definitions or comments on local schema terms.

validation_signals.label: Namespace violations
validation_signals.detail: Violations against the active namespace policy.

validation_signals.label: Mapping issues
validation_signals.detail: Mappings that remain risky or inconsistent after local checks.

validation_signals.label: OWL consistency hook
validation_signals.detail: Optional OWL reasoner hook. It is skipped when owlready2 is not installed.

validation_signals.label: EMMO checks
validation_signals.detail: Optional EMMO convention hook. It is skipped when EMMOntoPy is not installed.

validation_signals.label: OOPS! hook
validation_signals.detail: OOPS! something went wrong. There was an unexpected error.

validation_signals.label: FOOPS! hook
validation_signals.detail: FOOPS! assessment completed in file mode. Accessible checks may remain unassessed.

publication_assets.label: Machine-readable source
publication_assets.detail: Primary Turtle serialization for the release candidate.

publication_assets.label: JSON-LD source
publication_assets.detail: JSON-LD serialization for the release candidate.

publication_assets.label: Alignment mappings
publication_assets.detail: Conservative alignment output for review and publication.

publication_assets.label: Release bundle
publication_assets.detail: Bundle status depends on whether the current command executed the release-bundle stage.

publication_assets.label: w3id artifacts
publication_assets.detail: Redirect templates and publication notes for stable public identifiers.

failed_checks.label: F1
failed_checks.detail: Unexpected error while running the test: null

failed_checks.label: F2
failed_checks.detail: The following metadata was not found: version iri

failed_checks.label: R1
failed_checks.detail: The following metadata was not found: version info, citation

failed_checks.label: R1
failed_checks.detail: The following metadata was not found: doi, logo, status, source, issued. Warning: The following OPTIONAL detailed metadata could not be found: previous version, backwards compatibility. Please consider adding them if appropriate.

failed_checks.label: R1.2
failed_checks.detail: The following provenance information was not found: issued

failed_checks.label: I2
failed_checks.detail: The ontology does not reuse vocabularies for common metadata

failed_checks.label: I2
failed_checks.detail: The ontology does not import/extend other vocabularies.

failed_checks.label: F1
failed_checks.detail: Version IRI  not defined. Version information not found.  Please consider adding it to describe the version number of the ontology.

foops.message: FOOPS! assessment completed in file mode. Accessible checks may remain unassessed.
foops.ontology_title: H2KG: Ontology for Proton Exchange Membrane Fuel Cell Materials, Components, and Experiments

oops.message: OOPS! something went wrong. There was an unexpected error.

section_explanations.fair_signals: Internal FAIR signals estimate release readiness from the built ontology package itself. They are conservative but not equivalent to live post-publication FAIR audits.
section_explanations.transparency_hooks: External transparency hooks call public assessment services. Their availability depends on external infrastructure and network access.
section_explanations.validation_signals: Validation signals summarize local structural, metadata, namespace, mapping, and optional SHACL checks on the release candidate.
section_explanations.publication_assets: Publication asset rows show whether the files required for public release were actually built in the current run.
